brand.name: Naifa Al-arifi
brand.tagline: AI Engineer | IT Student | Building Intelligent Systems

hero.headline: AI Engineer & Developer
hero.subheadline: IT student with a strong focus on Artificial Intelligence, plus hands-on experience in web development, intelligent systems, and IoT-based solutions.

about.headline: About Me
about.name: Naifa Al-arifi
about.bio: I am an IT student specializing in Artificial Intelligence with hands-on experience in building intelligent systems, AI models, and real-world applications. My interests extend to software systems, web development, and IoT, allowing me to build complete solutions that combine intelligence with practical implementation.

items.title: Makani – AI-Powered Real Estate Search Engine
items.description: Developed an intelligent search platform using NLP and LLMs to process real estate queries and deliver ranked search results.

items.title: WildArabia – AI-Based Wildlife Identification System
items.description: Developed an AI-powered system using computer vision to identify and classify wildlife species and provide accurate recognition insights.

items.title: Tabayyun – AI-Driven Anomaly Detection System
items.description: Built a machine learning system to detect abnormal patterns in financial transactions and support early anomaly detection.

items.title: SEEN – Smart Emergency Wearable System
items.description: Developed a complete emergency response system including a wearable device, cross-platform mobile applications, and cloud integration for real-time alerts.

items.title: Mathematics for Machine Learning and Data Science
Haqthon
items.description: Winning third place with the project “Rafiq” at the national level in Hackathon Haqthon, organized by the Human Rights Commission, within the Knowledge Track, among several teams and projects.

items.title: Absher Tuwaiq Hackathon
items.description: Participated in the Absher Tuwaiq Hackathon and contributed to setting a Guinness World Record for the largest hackathon in the world, representing Saudi Arabia.

items.title: Robotics & Sports Club Leadership Recognition
items.description: Awarded a certificate of appreciation from the Robotics & Sports Club at Imam Mohammad Ibn Saud Islamic University in recognition of leadership, continuous contribution, and active role in mentoring members, strengthening teamwork, and supporting the club’s mission and impact.

cta.headline: Let’s Get in Touch
cta.subheadline: Have a project in mind, want to collaborate, or simply say hi? My email and phone are always open.

footer.about_text: AI-focused IT student passionate about building intelligent systems, software solutions, and real-world technical projects.
